summary:
SPIRITUAL DISCIPLINE AND DIVINE TIMING: Brandon emphasizes the importance of patience and spiritual stillness, recounting how the Lord instructed him to pull weeds and seek peace instead of rushing to deliver prophetic messages. Brandon draws parallels to Jesus delaying His journey to heal Lazarus and Mary sitting at Jesus' feet while Martha was distracted with chores. Brandon highlights that prioritizing spiritual accuracy and intimacy with the Creator, much like George Washington Carver did, is essential before sharing divine revelations.

MIDDLE EASTERN CONFLICTS AND SHIFTS: Brandon shares detailed visions concerning massive geopolitical upheavals, including the crippling of Iran's nuclear infrastructure and a subsequent major spiritual revival in the country. Brandon warns of an impending biological attack originating from Syria, which will leave Damascus in ruins and prompt Turkey to assist as a wounded brother. This event will allegedly ignite a massive war with ground troops, angering Arab nations following an Israeli strike, while global power dynamics shift from the West to the Middle East alongside the rise of the Antichrist and a new industrial revolution.

CYBERATTACKS AND INFRASTRUCTURE COLLAPSE: Brandon describes impending, severe cyberattacks targeting major American infrastructure, specifically mentioning a massive power grid failure in New York City where generators will be used to illuminate darkened buildings. Brandon foresees targeted cyber disruptions against the FAA and specific entities starting with the letter 'A', including an airline experiencing mid-air instrument failures and a major bank suffering complete ATM and computer network blackouts. Additionally, Brandon predicts a deliberate grid-down scenario in Cuba linked to Russian influences.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND POLITICAL LEADERSHIP: Brandon issues grave warnings about internal domestic threats, specifically referencing Timothy McVeigh and the use of fertilizer bombs as a code for an upcoming attack orchestrated by an enemy within due to open borders. Brandon predicts a significant humbling and shaking of America that will drive people to their knees in prayer, while also foreseeing a future window of great blessing and oil wealth under the leadership of Donald Trump, despite attempts by foreign adversaries to crash global economies through oil manipulation.

CELESTIAL DISTURBANCES AND GLOBAL AWAKENING: Brandon details fearful sights in the heavens, including a major shifting of the Earth's electromagnetic poles and severe solar disruptions. Brandon claims to have spiritually witnessed a binary system, often referred to as Planet X or Nibiru, and warns of Wormwood and other terrifying cosmic events that align with Oral Roberts' prophecies. Concurrently, Brandon foresees a massive global spiritual harvest and transformation, including the sudden fall of Kim Jong-un's regime in North Korea, creating a brief window for South Korea to introduce the gospel and spark unprecedented creative miracles before Chinese intervention.

MAINTAINING SPIRITUAL ENDURANCE: Brandon urges believers to remain spiritually hydrated and anchored to the fundamentals of their faith, cautioning that ministries detached from the divine vine will eventually wither. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of going vertical in prayer and avoiding the distractions of global chaos, assuring that a period of divine refreshing is available for those who are weary. Brandon concludes by encouraging continuous worship and reliance on the Holy Spirit to navigate the heavy burdens of these prophetic times.
rawData: [June 25, 2025]-[The Lord showed me major cyber attacks]-[https://youtu.be/WC9nwG5RyQw]-[Hey, good morning family. Well, I have a hard word to give, but first off, I want to tell you all thank you for praying for me. Thank you for being here and being a part of this family, this prayer channel. You know, I was going to do this word yesterday and I was going to tell you what the Lord is showing me concerning America and what's coming. But I didn't want to come out and just give it. I wanted to pray over it. Yesterday, like I said, I was driving around and the Lord gave me the word. He said, 'I want you to go home and I want you to dig in the flower beds. I want you to go outside and pull weeds right now.' I said, 'Well, I'm going to go in and do the video.' He said, 'No, you're not. You're going to go outside and pull weeds.' I said, 'Yes, sir.' So, I was out there just praying in the spirit and just pulling weeds in the flower bed all afternoon and just praying and asking Him, 'So, what do you want me to say?' And He said, 'Nothing yet. Go low. Go slow. Go low inside. Go deep inside. Pray in the spirit and go slow about it. Don't be quick to deliver a word. There's no urgency.' And He gave me the scriptures. He said, 'Ephesians 5:1: Be an imitator of God, as dear children imitate their earthly fathers. Imitate the Lord.' And I was like, 'So what do you mean by that?' And He started talking about how He wasn't quick to go out and raise Lazarus from the dead. The urgency was there and everybody was pushing Him, saying, 'Lazarus is sick. He's dying,' and all the things were going around—all the voices around Him. He was hearing Lazarus is sick and dying, and all the voices around Him were trying to pressure Him to move out of what God was telling Him to do, which was stay still, peace, peace. Four days go by, and Jesus goes, and they said, 'He stinks, Lord.' So there was no urgency in His spirit except to follow what the Father had told Him to do. Then He started bringing up Mary and Martha. Mary was sitting at the feet of Jesus, listening to Him, staying vertical. She didn't do what Martha was doing. Martha was in there probably throwing pots and pans around, getting all upset because nobody was in there helping her, because she felt it was urgent to cook the food for all the disciples and for Jesus. And so Mary is doing what we should be doing, staying at the feet of Jesus. There's no urgency when you're in peace like that, is what the Lord was showing me. Be an imitator of God. What did Jesus do? He stayed, and He heard the Father's voice concerning Lazarus. And what did Mary do? She stayed at His feet. Martha was out there doing all the busy work, but she should have been at the feet, too. The urgency of the hour is staying at the feet of Jesus, not being moved by the circumstances of what you're seeing in the news, thinking, 'I've got to come out and tell everybody what the Lord is saying.' And the Lord said, 'No, pull weeds.' I said, 'Whoa, I don't understand.' But it's called dying to self, and it's His channel. And that's what He was trying to get across to me: no matter how much you think you need to deliver a word because you know it's important, this is more important. 'I need you to rest. I need you to stay right here at my feet right now, vertical. There's much that I need to talk to you about. And the only way you're going to hear what I'm going to tell you is by staying right here like Mary. Don't be Martha right now, Brandon. Stay at my feet.' There are a lot of people being Marthas, and they're running around trying to make the first video and be the first. He said, 'But it's more important to be accurate, and the only way you stay accurate is staying at my feet. Pull weeds.' And I was like, you know, you have all these things going, 'Well, I've got to pull weeds. Be still.' Do you know how hard it is sometimes when you feel like you haven't heard the word and you're going, 'Well, Lord, you gave me the word, so...' But here I was, and I started praying in the spirit, and you know what He started doing? He started showing me flowers. I started praying in the spirit and I'm looking and seeing if He's going to show me anything else, and He started showing me flowers. I saw beautiful lavender flowers that looked like heaven. It was glimpses, and I started weeping because of the beauty of the flowers. And He said, 'Remember, just like George Washington Carver, Brandon. He was the man that talked with the flowers, and God showed him the secret things because he put God first, and he didn't let the clutter cloud his mind of what was going on around him. He took time to spend with the Great Creator every single day at four o'clock in the morning. And no matter how much was going around him, he would always talk to the peanut, and the peanut shared its secrets with him.' George Washington Carver was a great man of God. And so I want to tell you, for what I'm about to tell you, this came later—more of what He was showing me is in store: 'A great shaking to awaken.' He keeps talking to me about it. And at this time, I was so tired. I was dozing off, and all of a sudden He wanted to talk more about what's coming, and I had heavy eyes. I was on the couch, and I was bobbing, doing the old bob. All of a sudden, He said, 'I have something to say.' And I went, 'Yes, sir. What's going on?' You know, and I started praying, and I'm talking down low. I said, 'Well, Lord, you picked a real fine time.' But it's not in my time; it's in Yours. It was when my flesh was out of the way. I was completely exhausted, and I told my son, 'Grab the recorder.' I said, 'The Father's going to talk, and I'm really tired right now, but I'm going to say what He says.' But I was dead to my flesh at that point instead of being like a chicken with its head cut off, flapping its wings all around. It was at the time when my flesh was out of the way and He could talk the loudest. And I said, 'You know, Lord, You really are so amazing to me.' 'Focus on the flowers today, Brandon. Focus on the flowers.' And there will be a lot of you who say, 'Oh, Brandon, get to it.' I just did. I just did. I just told you a vital piece of the puzzle that many of you will try to bypass because you're so busy. But like the Lord is always telling me, He said, 'You're in a hurry to go nowhere. Nothing else matters. Everything that you're trying to achieve on this earth is going to be gone.' Most people are trying to build their future and all these great things, the wealth and all the things on this earth. But the Lord said to me, 'Brandon, sow the seeds for the thousand years. Sow the seeds for what you'll reap on the other side. For what you sow in secret, you'll be rewarded openly.' So, this is what I saw. You know, a lot of people are focused on the peace agreement. They're saying, 'Hey, we're going to have a ceasefire and all these things.' And if you go back to the video where I was praying—I gave a short on it back in December—the Lord showed me that they'll call peace and safety. There'll be peace agreements. So, we go to what the Lord's already showed us, and now we're seeing it in the news seven months later. Seven months later, and He's warning about sudden destruction, major attacks still coming. They are not satisfied with what they have achieved. Iran is saying this because they lost so much. They dumped billions and billions of dollars into their nuclear program and it was completely wiped out. A lot of it—I don't think all of it, in my opinion, of what I've seen in the spirit. Not all of it, but a big majority of it. And the Lord showed me still to come a major revival in Iran—a major, major revival. As they're distracted, the infrastructure of things is going to be very crippled, set back by decades. The Lord said, 'like the Stone Age, back in the decades,' because they're going to be delayed big time. But I saw infrastructure problems with the electricity, with a lot of things. And the Lord even talked about oil. So with all that being said, what was the next thing I told you? I warned you about a biological attack coming out of Syria. And many people, when they saw the World War II video, they said, 'Brandon, you said there would be a great betrayal.' And I said, 'Wait, it's still coming. Wait, it's still coming.' I see these are different visions for different scenarios, and it's not all about what's happening right now. This is like an onion; it has a lot of layers. And the next thing I believe we're going to see is a major attack against Syria as Iran retaliates. And the Houthis, the rebels, and these people out of Syria will use some kind of biological weapon, and they will attack them, and Damascus will become a ruinous heap when this takes place. I saw Turkey come to the aid of a wounded brother. I even have the video. This is exactly what the Lord said: they will come to the aid of a wounded brother, and all the other Arab nations will be furious when Israel strikes Syria in the days ahead. They weren't upset so much about Iran. The Lord said this was a red-headed stepchild to their faith. But Syria is pure blood to them; they're upset about this for some reason. And I don't understand all this stuff—the Shiites and the Sunnis and all that stuff. It's because, you know, it's just not what I know. But the Lord said, 'When they attack Syria, son, you're going to see a great uprising.' But not only that, there will be troops on the ground. A major, major war will break out when this takes place, but this is later. But I've warned you. When does this happen? I don't know. But I've warned you about an uprising of financial things with crypto and oil, and things with the uprising of the Antichrist and all this stuff in the days ahead where you see the changing of the tide. It's coming. It's coming, going from Western to Middle Eastern, and you're going to see an uprising of things. And I've told you, a new industrial revolution. I've warned you about a lot of stuff, and to go and rehearse every vision right now would be redundant and take too much time, and there are a lot of you who don't want to take that time. But I rehearsed you about the Macy's and all the things that I've told you to pray over—the Fourth of July, praying over our nation, our churches, our mega-churches, from Joel Osteen to Steven Furtick, the mega-churches in this nation. And then I saw that judgment begin in the house of the Lord. It was a two-sided thing: you would see fear about people gathering together, and then there's correction coming to churches. I saw in California and other mega-churches that there will be a major cleansing of the house because there's been hidden sin. That's been another part of this. Okay, so what do I see right now? What I saw yesterday: I saw major cyberattacks coming. I saw major cyberattacks coming. And when it happens, I saw the electric grid in major cities being cyberattacked, and I saw the people that were behind this. I saw the dragon. I saw Iran. There was more to this unfolding than just Iran in the days ahead. Okay, so do you know about our planes and all the weirdness that's been going on with our flights, and people landing wrong, doing things right? Planes flipping upside down—weird stuff that we've never seen before, a lot of uneasiness about flying. I saw cyberattacks on planes. I saw certain airlines that start with an A being attacked because of their name. Then I saw people flying in these jets and their screens going black, like a fuse messed up or something. I don't know how it happens, it just goes, and I saw all their instruments, and all of a sudden, the plane falls out of the sky. Great confusion when it comes to this. I saw the radars and the flight decks of all the major airports going dark. Confusion, not knowing how to tell the pilots where to be in the skies, like a movie. This was very real and very detailed in this vision, seeing this great confusion coming to certain airline industries, trying to get people to be afraid to fly. Then I saw a major bank, and on the bank, one of the words starts with an A. That's similar to the airplane—they're kind of the same. That's what I'm going to tell you. And when this takes place, I saw people not being able to get their money out because the computers were down. ATMs—I saw people at the ATM trying to put their card in, and all the ATMs at that certain bank were completely black. They weren't able to have banking because there was a cyberattack with the banks, and people were panicking, trying to get their money out, and they couldn't because the banks were down, trying to mess with the economy. Okay, when I saw the grid for the electricity and the cyberattacks, it was in New York. I saw New York City—I saw the Big Apple, right? What you would say, but it was like a major American city. I saw darkness on all of the major buildings. And they were shining lights somehow—I don't know how, like generators trying to shine lights to create power because they didn't want people to loot. Spotlights, you know, trying to make things look brighter in the city by generators. And I saw light shining on the buildings for reflection, because it's kind of mirrored on the glass of the buildings. But they were trying to make it where it was trying to glow because it was so dark in the city. And that's really interesting. I don't know, it's just what I saw, and I'm just telling you what I saw—trying to shine it off the building. So I saw all that. I saw the FAA—cyberattacks coming to the FAA. And I saw darkness on Cuba—darkness like a complete grid-down. And this was on purpose and in retaliation. There are things there that are not being said because they're making ties with Russia. And because of these ties with Russia, certain entities are trying to influence—they see it, they know it's coming, they know what they're doing. And there's darkness coming to Cuba. I saw darkness on it, and I don't know why—some kind of cyber, I don't know, but I saw darkness. And I've told you that. And the mules left during the darkness—the mules left trying to be in the cover of night. There's more to this. But what we saw at the beginning of the year with planes doing certain things that seemed kind of off was cyber. There's more cyber to this. So I tell you all this not to create fear, but to warn you. You know, when I saw all the fish floating in the water because of the volcanoes that are about to erupt, and I saw the major attacks. And the Lord kept bringing up Timothy McVeigh to me, and I thought, 'Lord, why do you keep talking about Timothy McVeigh?' Y'all let the elevator go to the top, Brandon. It's because the Lord said, 'Brandon, it's what he used. It's what he used. I'm telling you, don't forget Timothy McVeigh because I'm trying to talk to you.' It's like code he's trying to tell me—it's what he used. And folks, I've already warned you in January about the fertilizer. And I thought, 'Well, that's interesting,' because I added it together, because when I'm hearing something, I just repeat what I hear, and I just go, 'This is what I hear: don't forget Timothy McVeigh.' And I'm like, 'Okay, well, that doesn't make any sense to me in the natural, but I'll say it.' And I say it, and then I'm asking Him, and I just go into prayer by myself and I... Can I ask a question? Why do you keep saying that? It doesn't make any sense to me. That man's dead. He was executed. He says, "It's because of how he did it and what he did." And I said, "Oh my gosh, I was just a kid." I remember. So my son, we all googled; he used the fertilizer. And the Lord told me, "I want you to remember the bomb. This stuff is still... you need to pray this. This is very serious stuff that I'm talking about right now, folks." And so I bring all this to you because as we see Iran say, "Oh, yeah, we have a ceasefire agreement," remember, there's an enemy within. There's an enemy within. And I'm telling you, thanks to Joe Biden for doing that because they opened the borders. And the Lord told me again in my prayer time when he visited me, he said, "You will be so thankful in the days ahead for the leadership Trump will bring in this time, for there is a great humbling coming." He said a shaking that will bring people to their knees. That means to prayer. Do you see that when he says that? He said a shaking that will awaken, that will bring people to their knees. And I thought, "Well, are they going to bow down?" No, to bring you to your knees. Here I am again. I'm repeating what he says and I'm going, "What does that mean? They're going to be brought to their knees?" Well, they're going to pray. They're going to humble themselves and pray because all the stuff that's coming is going to freak them out. It's going to bring people back to prayer. And he said, "I'm waking up the bride. I'm waking up the church. I'm coming." But a lot of these things, people think that America is going to come out of this and we're going to have all... I'm not doubting that we're going to have some good days. Ladies and gentlemen, the Lord said, "Those that bless Israel I will bless." And I saw great blessing. And I heard President Trump in the spirit realm say, "Drill, baby, drill!" And I saw great oil wealth. How many times have I told you I've heard that? Well, he just did a Truth Social: "Drill, baby, drill. Open the wells as the Strait in Iran." The Lord showed me them trying to block things and trying to cause oil prices and the economies of the world to crash. They're mad. But I'm telling you, it's in retaliation to what has been done to them. So, they're not over, regardless of if we try to strong-arm them. They are a wounded animal and they are waiting to retaliate and strike back. But it will be a Pearl Harbor experience. It will be when you are not expecting it. And that's why we have got to get this in the spirit realm first before it manifests. Does that make sense? We need to know ahead of time. And the Lord says he doesn't want any of us to be caught off guard. The Holy Spirit will lead us and guide us into all things. But it takes us sitting at his feet like Mary, sitting outside in the flowers, and saying, "Stop all the clutter." That's what he tried to tell me. You've got to stop all the clutter. What's most important right now is going inward and staying vertical. All this other stuff—who's saying what, who's saying this—no. Stay at my feet. It doesn't matter. There are many voices right now. There are many words being prophesied right now, and it's not about being first; it's about being accurate. Do you understand? There'll be many words that are given and they'll prove just to be hot air. I do not want to be hot air. And the Lord said, "Brandon, the only way you will remain as accurate as what has been is to keep going within, listening to the Holy Spirit." That is what he's talking about—getting in this Bible, praying in tongues, sitting at his feet. Stop. It's not about all the hype. Do you see? The hype is not where he's at. He said, "I'm in the still, small voice sitting in the garden, not the spotlights." God does not like the spotlights. God likes slow and steady wins the race, not the hare. Fast, fast, fast, sleep on the side. So I try to present it to you in a way of how I'm being corrected, because you think you have to be so quick to do things and the Lord says, "I'm not in it. I'm not in it. I'm not in the ego of it. If you want to be with me, you're going to be slow, just like Lazarus." Everybody's panicking. "He's dead. What are you going to do? He's sick. Come pray for him." He's like, "I'll go. I'll go when I'm told to." Four days. "Well, why are you here now? Well, he stinks now," sarcastically. "You're a little late." "Oh ye of little faith. Throw the stone away. Lazarus, come forth!" A miracle happens. God's not in the static. He's in that peace. He is the Prince of Peace, ladies and gentlemen. He is the peace that passes all understanding, and he is not in chaos. He is in peace. Don't be quick to react. Be quick to pray. Be slow to speak. Be slow to speak. That's what he says to me: "Be slow to speak, Brandon. Be still, Brandon. Shh. I'm not in all that. Be slow to speak, son. Shh." But I'm warning you what he says today, and that's what I had for you because it shook me. So I've taken the time to pray over it, and I saw major attacks still coming. I saw a major shaking coming to America as the black horse gets ready to ride. The Lord said, "You have a window of great blessing." And that's why we want to be plugged in and go to Billy Burke meetings, go to be around revival. Diana and I are desperate for it. And that's the only way you stay vertical—by being in meetings and feeding your spirit and getting that fresh touch. You just need one second with the Father, which turns into hours because you don't want to leave that one second. That one second changes you, and you just go, "If I could just get a thimbleful like this of the living water of fresh Holy Ghost and drink it today, it's going to change my life forever." And that's all that matters. I had a word for you all, and it was about staying on the vine. And the Lord said, "You'll see so many ministries in the days ahead that have detached the branch from the vine. And you'll see you have a little bit of life for a little bit, Brandon, whenever you detach yourself. But eventually the branch withers and dies." The fruit of it, even fruit like an apple tree or whatever, you cut that off, there are some apples on it—they don't die instantaneously, but over the course of time, because they're not on the vine, they wither up. And he said, "You'll see a lot of ministries that have detached themselves from me that are living off of several years ago being on that branch, and they were a big branch. And the bigger the branch, the more life it had in it. But the more they're detached from him, the more they dry up." And he said, "The only way you'll have true life in these last days is if you abide in me and my words remain in you. You must stay on the vine for what is coming, or you will not make it. You have to go vertical all the time and stay on that vine. Do not allow yourself to be separated from him, no matter all the hype of what's going on around you." He said, "You will see many fearful things." If you're going horizontal and you're looking at all the stuff going on in the world, the Bible says that men's hearts will fail them for fear, looking after those things that are coming on the earth. That's people who are detaching themselves. If I'm staying on him, if he's abiding in me and I'm abiding in him and I'm imitating him as Ephesians 5:1 says—imitating him as dear children imitate their father—imitate God. He is not in a hurry. He's not in chaos. He's an ever-present help in a time of need. But he's that still, small voice that will lead you. And it's so important for what's coming for you to understand: go back to the basics. Go back to the basics. We've got to go back to what we cut our teeth on. What are the fundamentals of Christianity? Do not forget the fundamentals. Don't make it so hard like an algebra equation and think, 'Well, you know, Christianity is so hard.' No, it's easy for a five-year-old to have it. Go back to the basics: ABCs, one-two-threes. It's all easy. Get in the Word. Pray in tongues. Pray in English, whatever you know. Go to church. Volunteer. Do what you've got to do. Stay close to the Vine. And that's where it is every day. And I'm telling you, it's hard, especially the bigger this platform gets because you're swayed by people. You know, it tries to pull you—the need of the people, the need of the people. 'Lazarus is dead. We need you to pray.' Hold on, I've got to go vertical. I've got to stay in my ABCs, because if I don't get this part right, this part's really going to mess up. If I don't get my one-two-threes right, no matter how bad I know the people need me—no, no. Vertical, vertical, vertical. Keep my eyes on Jesus. That's all that matters. Because if I hear Him, He does the rest because it's all about Him anyway. It's like Billy Burke says: you attract to deflect. Do you understand? The anointing attracts the people to deflect the glory to Him. We always deflect the glory to Him. It's important that He gets all the glory, honor, and praise at all times, especially for what is coming. A major harvest of souls is coming. And then the Lord told me, He said, 'I'm dealing with Iran, and there will be more crippling within, and you'll see a great change—a great change in the church, a great change for the people who have been behind the Iron Curtain that have not been able to get the Word to them. I'm bringing that down so every ear will hear. And I'm ready to deal with Kim Jong-un and his family. And there will be a window of opportunity, and I saw South Korea coming in and bringing the gospel to them as you see a tyrant regime brought down in the days ahead. He is a social pariah.' And the Lord told me, 'I'm going to deal with him. And there will be a window of opportunity before China tries to come in and bring in more communism and all the things that they try to do to try to keep North Korea under their boot. You'll see this.' But the Lord said, 'I'm giving a window for My people to hear, and they will entertain angels unaware. A major, major move of God is coming in North Korea, I tell you by the Spirit of God.' He said, 'I've not forgotten the people of North Korea, just like I have not forgotten whenever the children of Israel were bound by Pharaoh. I have not forgotten the Asian people.' He said, 'A major move of God, creative miracles beyond anything you could imagine.' He said, 'Brandon, it's going to be supernatural like you've never seen before—even more so there than what it will even be in America.' He said, 'I'm wooing the people. Great bondage has been on them, and I'm wooing the people. Watch.' And so it's time to get excited about what is coming. I tell you the hard things, but I have to warn you about all of it. There are two sides. And it's time to be excited and busy about our Father's business. So, the belly of the ship—people said, 'What kind of boat was that that you saw?' After studying, my son studied it for a while and he said, 'Daddy, that is an oil tanker. It's a red...'—he even named the company that makes it—'a red deck on a white-looking where the people are, where the captain is at, with a black belly of a boat.' It had black, red, and white, and it was an oil tanker. And the Lord said, 'This is what they haul major crude out of, where that strait's at.' And I thought, 'That is so wild.' This is what they all use. Iran, all of them—they all use these big oil tankers. And that was the boat I saw that had the dirty thing in the middle of it, and it was oil inside there. When it went, it just messed things up really bad because it was an oil tanker full of oil, you know. I tell you about that, the water supplies, and so much, folks. There's so much to this, but that's not even the fearful sights in the heavens that you're about to see. The Lord told me, He said, 'Brandon, a major shaking's coming to the electromagnetic poles—the way the True North and all those things. I saw a major shifting coming to those poles.' And He even told me, He said, 'You'll see things with the sun. Major disruptions on the sun are coming. There's a binary system that people are not focused on, I'm telling you.' And people call it Planet X. People call it Nibiru or whatever, but I'm telling you, I've seen this in the spirit, and this stuff is real. And people go, 'Oh, that sounds like something way out there, Bran.' I'm telling you, I've seen it in the spirit. I've seen a black-looking planet thing that was completely blacked out that was moving, and it was spooky when I was watching it move, and I was like, 'What is that?' But I'm telling you, something major is coming. Something major is coming. And Gil Broussard, I guess, is his name, because after I started seeing this stuff, I was Googling, and my son was helping me, and Diana was helping me, and we're like, 'What is this stuff?' Because, you know, when you're seeing it, it's like, 'Is this...' You don't want to be flaky. I mean, it's like, 'What in the world?' But the Lord starts showing me this stuff, and I'm like, 'I'm telling you, there is something coming.' And Wormwood is coming, but Wormwood is not the big problem.
